title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Vegapunk, Luffy, Lilith, Unknown person #8, Nami as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Woah this place is awesome!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: weren't we gonna set sail?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is it the future?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There are two strange occurrences going on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Keep calm and listen.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: I wanna see Stella. What happened?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first one is... the main body Stella is missing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wasait weren't we gonna take vegapunk out to sea?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The second one is frontier dome isn't working correctly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huffering the best to get a look at the most important

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: your face got better!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's right. But he has disappeared.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do you mean?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We had spare parts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This means,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: first thing we have to do is find him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then, we can fix the dome.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How are we going to find vegapunk,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't leave the labophase.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we leave now we will get burned to death by lasers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he won't show up on the monitor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Usually you should be able to see everything in the lab on the monitors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because of the shock from the Seraphim fighting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The camera snails moved from their original position and lost cons-ciousness.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are having the satellite check on them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The camera snails may go in and out of consciousness.

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Shaka! Its phytha- goras!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doesn't look like there is anyone in the C Tower.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Okay, what about the next one?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go search for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to hurry up and find him so we can set sail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll go with you.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: and find the treasure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm worried too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll come to look for him too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WhoAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Punk

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess I'll go look for him too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the old man with the top of his head cut off, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wait a sec, moss- head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You of all people are gonna search for someone?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are gonna end up looking for you next!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah! That's definitely not zero's strong point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...just sit still, okay? *

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...what are you saying?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I guess they did have enough people to find him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just how much did you run?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huff....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huff... I'm always... ready to go...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that we'd run into these guys again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: takes me back... water 7...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder how old man ice is doing...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Inside the lab - Nikyu Room

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bonney! Don't touch that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shut up! Get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: UWAAH!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 59 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
